name: Chow Chow Chile Dip
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces canned diced mild green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. Cover the mixture and chill for at least 3 days, allowing flavors to meld.
3. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature (alternately used as a basting sauce for grilling).
